title: Empty Cart Checkout Allowed
description: The system allows users to proceed to the checkout flow even when the cart contains 0 items.
steps: 1. Login as standard_user. 2. Go to cart with 0 items. 3. Click Checkout.
expected: Checkout button should be disabled or an error message should appear.
actual: User is redirected to Checkout: Your Information page.

title: Unchecked Name Lengths (100+ chars)
description: Checkout Step 1 allows input strings exceeding 100 characters in the First Name and Last Name fields.
steps: 1. Login. 2. Add item. 3. Go to checkout. 4. Enter 100+ characters in name fields. 5. Click Continue.
expected: Fields should have a character limit or validation error.
actual: System accepts the long string without truncation.

title: Alphanumeric Postal Code Accepted
description: The Zip/Postal Code field accepts non-numeric characters and symbols.
steps: 1. Login. 2. Go to checkout. 3. Enter 'abcde' or '!@#$%' in Zip field. 4. Click Continue.
actual: System accepts the input and proceeds to overview.

title: Scroll Position Reset on Navigation
description: When clicking 'Back to products' from detail page, inventory resets to top.
steps: 1. Scroll down on inventory. 2. Click a product. 3. Click 'Back to products'.
expected: User should return to the previous scroll position.
actual: Page resets to the very top.

title: Read-only QTY field in Cart
description: On the Cart page, the QTY field is visible but cannot be edited by the user.
steps: 1. Add item. 2. View cart. 3. Try to change quantity.
expected: User should be able to update item quantity.

title: Post-Purchase Redirection Logic
description: Back Home button returns to inventory without logout option clarity.
expected: Optional logout or order history links.

title: Broken Inventory Images (Problem User)
description: All product images are replaced by 'sl-404.jpg' or fail to load.
actual: Generic 404 images appear for all items.

title: Broken Sorting Logic (Problem User)
description: The sorting dropdown fails to reorder items correctly.
steps: 1. Login as problem_user. 2. Select 'Price (low to high)'.
actual: Order remains unchanged or is random.

title: Last Name Field Overwrite (Problem User)
description: In Checkout Step 1, the Last Name field is cleared or rejected on submission.
steps: 1. Login as problem_user. 2. Fill checkout info. 3. Click Continue.
actual: Error: 'Last Name is required' or field resets.

title: Unresponsive Add to Cart (Onesie)
description: Sauce Labs Onesie cannot be added to cart under problem_user.
steps: 1. Login as problem_user. 2. Click 'Add to cart' for Onesie.

title: Broken Social Redirects (LinkedIn)
description: LinkedIn icon in footer leads to a 404 or broken sandbox URL.

title: Standard Backpack Add-to-Cart Failure
description: Backpack is completely unresponsive for error_user.
steps: 1. Login as error_user. 2. Click 'Add to cart' on Backpack.

title: Sticky Cart Items (Remove Failure)
description: The 'Remove' button fails for the Bolt T-Shirt in the error_user session.
steps: 1. Login as error_user. 2. Add Bolt T-Shirt. 3. Click 'Remove'.

title: Checkout Step 1 False Error
description: Submitting info results in 'First Name is required' even when field is populated.
steps: 1. Login as error_user. 2. Fill info. 3. Click Continue.
actual: Error message appeared for non-empty field.

title: Z-A Sorting Dead (Error User)
description: Sorting by 'Name (Z to A)' results in no UI change.
steps: 1. Login as error_user. 2. Select Z to A.

title: Fixed 5s Login Latency
description: Intentional delay on login for specific user profile.

title: Inventory Loading Lag (Glitch User)
description: UI freezing during inventory navigation.

title: Checkout Page Transition Latency
description: Moving through checkout steps is delayed by several seconds.

title: Misaligned Filter Icon Overlay
description: Filter triangle overlaps with selected text.

title: Stretched Image Aspect Ratios
description: Product images appear distorted vertically.

title: Incorrect Brand Font Weight
description: Header 'Swag Labs' uses inconsistent styling.

title: Off-center Login Error Icons
description: Red 'X' icons in error messages are not centered.

title: 'Reset App State' Refresh Dependency
description: Resetting state doesn't clear badge until manual refresh.
steps: 1. Add item. 2. Click Reset. 3. Observe badge.

title: Cross-User Cart Leakage
description: Cart contents persist across different user Logins in same session.
steps: 1. User A adds item. 2. Logout. 3. User B logins.

title: Inventory Direct Access Unauthenticated
description: UI briefly visible before redirect to login via URL manipulation.

title: 'About' Sidebar Link Redirects Externally
description: Redirects out of test environment to corporate site.
expected: Internal test info or new tab.

title: Logout Session Persistence in LocalStorage
description: Glitches carry over if storage isn't wiped on logout.

title: Footer Overlap on Small Viewports
description: Copyright text wraps awkwardly on mobile views.

title: Broken Ctrl+Backspace Shortcut
description: Input fields don't support standard deletion shortcuts.

title: Tax Rounding Discrepancy (Overview)
description: Tax calculation doesn't match standard 8% rounding.
